items.title: Dropbox Collaborates with GitHub to Reduce Monorepo Size from 87GB to 20GB
items.summaryShort: Dropbox Collaborates with GitHub to Reduce Monorepo Size from 87GB to 20GB. Dropbox reduced its backend monorepo from 87GB to 20GB by optimizing Git delta compression in collaboration with GitHub.

items.title: Presentation: Panel: Building a Culture that Works
items.summaryShort: Presentation: Panel: Building a Culture that Works. The panelists share insights on evolving company culture.

items.title: Cloudflare Sandboxes Reach General Availability, Giving AI Agents Persistent Isolated Environments

items.title: Article: When a Cloud Region Fails: Rethinking High Availability in a Geopolitically Unstable World
items.summaryShort: Article: When a Cloud Region Fails: Rethinking High Availability in a Geopolitically Unstable World. Sovereign fault domains are failure boundaries defined by legal, political, or physical jurisdiction rather than hardware topology.

items.title: Cloudflare Outlines MCP Architecture as Enterprises Confront Security and Governance Risks
items.summaryShort: Cloudflare Outlines MCP Architecture as Enterprises Confront Security and Governance Risks. Cloudflare has outlined a reference architecture for scaling Model Context Protocol (MCP) deployments across the enterprise, positioning centralized

items.title: Tesla just increased its spending plan to $25B — here's where the money is going
items.summaryShort: Tesla just increased its spending plan to $25B — here's where the money is going. Tesla's planned capex for 2026 is three times higher than what the company has historically spent.

items.title: Google updates Workspace to make AI your new office intern
items.summaryShort: Google updates Workspace to make AI your new office intern. Google has introduced a host of new automated functions into Workspace, all of which are driven by Workspace Intelligence, its new AI system.

items.title: Elon Musk admits millions of Tesla owners need upgrades for true ‘Full Self-Driving'
